nonGoals: No test changes in this deliverable
No UI wiring or consumer changes
No changes to SsmlAttrDef, SsmlTagDef, SSML_TAGS, or any other module
objective: Add exported getAttrDef(tagName, attrName) function to tags.ts
planText: In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.ts, add the exported function getAttrDef(tagName: string, attrName: string): SsmlAttrDef | undefined after the existing getTagDef function. The implementation: call getTagDef(tagName); if falsy, return undefined; otherwise return def.attributes.find((a) => a.name.toLowerCase() === attrName.toLowerCase()). No other changes to the file. Ensure the function is exported alongside the existing exports.

nonGoals: No changes to tags.ts in this deliverable
No new helper functions or exports
No changes to existing test blocks
objective: Add four vitest test cases for getAttrDef in tags.test.ts
planText: In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.test.ts: (a) add getAttrDef to the existing import from './tags', (b) inside the top-level describe('SSML Tag Registry', ...), add a new nested describe('getAttrDef', ...) block with four it-cases: (1) known attribute (tag 'break', attr 'time') returns the correct SsmlAttrDef with name 'time', (2) case-insensitive match (tag 'BREAK', attr 'TIME') returns the same result as the exact-case lookup, (3) unknown tag (e.g. 'nonexistent') returns undefined, (4) known tag ('break') with unknown attribute (e.g. 'nonexistent') returns undefined.
